description.from:
Detonates lightning in front, dealing 333*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ 208.8% of ATK M.DMG to enemies within range and creates [Electric Field] for 4sec.

[Electric Field]: Deals 48*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ 30.2% of ATK M.DMG every 0.4sec, and each hit has a 25% chance to stun enemies for 0.3sec.
description.to: Causes an electric explosion ahead, dealing ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and placing an electric field for 3 sec. The electric field deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 10 attacks and with 25% chance, stuns the enemy for 0.5 sec.

description.from: For 15sec, increases M.DEF by 224*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))[ and ATK Spd by 30%. During the duration, on Normal Attack, has a 30% chance to deal 0.3 additional M.DMG to 2allies and stun them for {7}sec.
description.to: For 10 sec, ATK is increased by ??? and all DEF is increased by ???. While the skill is in use, each auto attack has a 30% chance of dealing extra ??? M.DMG to 2 random enemies and stunning them for 0.5 sec.

description.from: Attacks enemies in a circular area around self, dealing 148*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ 92.8% of ATK M.DMG 3 time(s), then detonates lightning to deal 222*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ 139.2% of ATK M.DMG 3 times and stun enemies for 3sec.
description.to: Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 3 attacks to nearby enemies in a circular range. Then causes an Electric Explosion, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG over 3 attacks and stunning them for 5 sec.

description.from:
On attack, infuses [Charge] into enemies not under [Shock], increasing M.DMG taken by 1% for 10sec. [Charge] stacks up to 30 times. At 30 stacks, consumes all stacks to deal 926*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ 580% of ATK M.DMG and inflict [Shock] for 5sec.

[Shock]: Increases duration of all received Stun effects by 0.7sec and increases M.DMG taken by 40%.
description.to: With every attack, injects Electricity to targets not inflicted by Shock and increases M.DMG taken by 1% for 10 sec. Electricity can be stacked up to 30 times, and the 30th stack will consume all Electricity to deal ??? M.DMG and Shock the target for 7 sec. Enemies inflicted by Shock take 70% increased M.DMG, and when they are inflicted by Stun, the duration is increased by 0.7 sec.

light.from: Mana cost increases by 1000, but DMG is increased by 80%.

dark.from: Additional DMG is applied to up to 4 enemies.
dark.to: Additional DMG effect applies to all enemies.

light.from: When there is only 1 enemy, DMG is increased by 100%.
light.to: While in use, gain immunity to CC.

dark.from: Stun duration is increased by 1.2 sec.
dark.to: Stun duration is increased by 2 sec.

light.to: Shock duration is increased by 2 sec.

description.from: [Lightning Strike! ] Increases the duration of the electric field by 2 sec, and on each hit, increases own M.DEF by {0}% for 5 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
description.to: [Lightning Strike!] Extends the duration of electric field by 1 sec, and upon each hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 30 times.

description.from: [Power of Lightning! ] Converts the M.DEF increase effect into an ATK increase effect, and on attack, increases ATK by {0}% for 5 sec.
description.to: [Power of Lightning!] Changes the effect irremovable and increases the chance to trigger an additional damage by {0}% additionally.

description.from: [Electric Explosion!] Grants immunity to CC during casting, and on each hit, has a {0}% chance to apply 3 stacks of Charge. This effect also Stacks on enemies in Shock state.
description.to: [Electric Explosion!] When attacking enemy inflicted by Shock, the enemy takes 100% of ATK as extra M.DMG and target's M.DEF and P.DEF is reduced by {0}% for 5 sec.

description.from: [Shock] Increases Magic DMG taken by enemies in Shock state by 60%, and additionally reduces their M.DEF by {0}%.
description.to: [Shock] Enemies under [Shock] take 100% increased M.DMG, and normal attacks have {0}% chance to inflict 1 stack of Electricity to the enemy. This effect also applies to enemies under [Shock].

description.from: [Shock] duration is changed to {0}. When attacking a target in [Shock] state with a Normal Attack, reduces cooldown by {1}% and deals additional Magic DMG equal to 100% of ATK.
description.to: Shock duration is increased by {0} sec. When auto attacking an enemy inflicted by Shock, all cooldowns are reduced by {1}%.

description.from:
Summons the Soul of Eye of the Storm, Yanadis, dealing 300% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a wide frontal area and stunning them for 3sec. Afterwards, creates [Raging Magnetic Field] for 6sec.

[Raging Magnetic Field]: Increases the duration of CC effects enemies take by 30%.
description.to: Summons the Soul of Eye of the Storm, Yanadis, and deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in a wide frontal range and stuns them for 3 sec. Afterward, places [Raging Magnetic Field] for 6 sec. Enemies within the [Raging Magnetic Field] take 30% increased M.DMG, and the duration of all CC effects the enemies take increases by 30%.

1.from: Increases the duration of [Raging Magnetic Field] by 3 sec.
1.to: Increases the duration of Raging Magnetic Field by 3 sec.

2.from: Deals 25% of ATK + 3% of Sonia’s Max HP as M.DMG to enemies within [Raging Magnetic Field] every 1 sec.
2.to: Deals M.DMG equal to 3% of Sonia's Max HP every sec to enemies within Raging Magnetic Field.
